{"success":true,"provider":"Transperth (Public Transport Authority of Western Australia)","official_gtfs_rt_api":false,"static_gtfs_available":true,"static_gtfs_url":"https://www.transperth.wa.gov.au/About-Transperth/Spatial-Data-Access","message":"
⚠️ IMPORTANT: Transperth does NOT provide an official public GTFS Realtime API.

Current Status:
- Static GTFS data: Available via transperth.wa.gov.au
- Real-time vehicle positions: NOT publicly available
- Real-time trip updates: NOT publicly available  
- Service alerts: Limited (website scraping only)

Alternative Data Sources:
1. Static GTFS schedules (updated periodically)
2. Unofficial community APIs (not guaranteed)
3. Transperth website scraping (fragile)

For production use, consider:
- Using static schedule data only
- Requesting official API access from PTA (Public Transport Authority)
- Using third-party aggregators like TripGo

This MCP server provides stub implementations for future API availability.
","recommendation":"Use static GTFS data for schedule information. Real-time data requires unofficial APIs or API access request to PTA.","coverage":{"population":"2.8 million (11% of Australia)","city":"Perth metropolitan area","modes":["train","bus","ferry"]},"alternative_approaches":[{"method":"Static GTFS","reliability":"High","data_freshness":"Updated periodically (weeks)","use_case":"Schedule planning, stop locations"},{"method":"Unofficial APIs","reliability":"Low (may break)","data_freshness":"Real-time","use_case":"Experimental only","example":"https://realtime.transperth.info/SJP/Trip"},{"method":"Request Official Access","reliability":"High (if approved)","data_freshness":"Real-time","use_case":"Production apps","contact":"Public Transport Authority WA"}]}

structuredContent.provider: Transperth (Public Transport Authority of Western Australia)
structuredContent.message:
⚠️ IMPORTANT: Transperth does NOT provide an official public GTFS Realtime API.

Current Status:
- Static GTFS data: Available via transperth.wa.gov.au
- Real-time vehicle positions: NOT publicly available
- Real-time trip updates: NOT publicly available  
- Service alerts: Limited (website scraping only)

Alternative Data Sources:
1. Static GTFS schedules (updated periodically)
2. Unofficial community APIs (not guaranteed)
3. Transperth website scraping (fragile)

For production use, consider:
- Using static schedule data only
- Requesting official API access from PTA (Public Transport Authority)
- Using third-party aggregators like TripGo

This MCP server provides stub implementations for future API availability.
structuredContent.recommendation: Use static GTFS data for schedule information. Real-time data requires unofficial APIs or API access request to PTA.
